values.value:
Dear {!Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!
To support you through your home buying journey, we have prepared a step-by-step guide covering the entire process from booking to registration. The guide outlines all required actions for both bank-funded and self-funded customers, helping ensure a smooth and timely registration process.
You can access the resources below: Booking to Registration Guide: {{Video_Link}}
We recommend reviewing these materials carefully to understand the upcoming steps and documentation requirements.
If you require any assistance, please feel free to reach out to our support team.
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises {!$Label.Support_Email} | {!$Label.Support_Phone} {!$Label.App_Link}

Registration Support 📘
Your booking-to-registration guide is ready. Check the app and move ahead smoothly.
